title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
description: Attackers send a flood of requests or malicious data to the system, overwhelming its resources and causing a denial of service.
attack_vector: Malformed requests, oversized data payloads, or exploitation of vulnerabilities leading to excessive resource consumption.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting and traffic shaping.
Input validation and sanitization to prevent malicious data from being processed.
Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter out malicious requests.
